title: Had my results today @ The Royal Marsden
body:
PSA 0.01! 

They are monitoring me so having a blood test after 3 months , as it was near my bladder 

They said my cancer is non aggressive but highly contagious!  

I have been given a pump as the Sildenafil did nothing tbh  !

So on the fence atm going forward 

Tc All 👊🏻 🫶
